productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Ann Off White Top
description: Composition White sleeveless round neck top made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, has a chiffon-edged neck, pearl, stone and bead embellishments Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash Do not twist arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. The embellishments on this top give the effect of strings of pearls and beads around your neck - no need to wear jewelry, this top has it all. Pair it with funky denims and sky high heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
